untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern detection requires multi-bar geometric pattern recognition (symmetrical structure, even rims, tall/narrow dimensions) which cannot be expressed using point-in-time technical indicators. Pattern identification requires candlestick shape analysis over a lookback window and symmetry calculations not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used Donchian breakout (dc_upper) as nearest substitute for upward breakout detection, volume confirmation for pattern strength, and a 49-day hold window (6-7 weeks per source) for trend reversal. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given -33% to -36% drawdown data. This is a significant approximation—true diamond pattern detection requires dedicated pattern recognition not available in this indicator library.
